review_title: AppNomu - Make Payments Faster and Secure.
description: my overall experience has been a moderate.
author: Shubham K.
pros: what i like most is there Customer service they always available to assist with any questions or concerns you may have.
cons: what i like don’t like is sometimes they cancel the loan request.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Good tool on the market for both hosting and marketing
description: I have used AppNomu and has been a promising tool since, then, good support and as far as hosting is concerned, AppNomu stands to be better
author: Joshua R.
pros: It has been a long time since I started using AppNomu and I have seen a lot of improvement in the features and functionalities. I like the instant provision of SSL certificates that makes the website more secure and the provision of the unlimited SSD storage makes it easier to build any application without worrying about storage. The customer support team at AppNomu responds to questions on time even when the question is outside hosting, you get a response and a solution faster compared to other tools that I have evaluated
cons: I tried out using the BULK SMS feature of AppNomu and at first, it was reliable and stable enough that SMSs were faster but often we do not get our SMS delivered to the contacts and yet same time we get charged.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: It has the worst service care I have never seen
author: Muwonge B.
pros: It is simple to use and it has no hard English terms
cons: Absolutely nothing, it's a good experience to me.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Good tool to trust and use
description: I use it to host websites and sending bulk SMS
author: Angella Nakato M.
pros: User interfaces are smooth and easier to navigate and the unmetered storage for hosting provided
cons: They do not support other currencies besides the UGX and USD and conversion rate is high

review_title: I like the real time support from the tool
description: I use the AppNomu website builder to build websites and offer hosting our applications

cons: I have not seen any issue with the software yet, I will update my review if any do exist

review_title: Champion your financial activities with the best financial management functionalities from AppNomu.
description: The experience using AppNomu has been so satisfying and very productive to our business. It has allowed us to easily manage our financial activities and helped us improve our business productivity through loans as well as providing incentives and rewards to our customers.
author: Minal D.
pros: One of the nicest things about AppNomu is that with just a business registration certificate and a trading license, you are eligible to business loans which are affordable within 72 hours without actually having to sign any paperwork or visit their offices. It also provides a very reliable platform where you can promote your business by offering rewards and incentives to your customers. It makes use of modern technology security features to ensure total safety of your data, information and transactions from any form of security breaches whether internal or external. It has a very user-friendly interface which has a well arranged dashboard making it easy to use for everyone.
cons: I have had a very fruitful and error-free experience with AppNomu so there is nothing i like least about it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Mayank G.
pros: I'm using this platform for the E Payments, recharge and gift cards. It is very secure and reliable platform, also works very efficiently & flawlessly. Dashboard provides all information related to transaction and expenses. It saves lots of time in doing transactions and financial management, also saves money as well. Customer care is top notch always available to help on your queries. Price of this tool is very affordable.
cons: Nothing as such issue for me. It is very good platform for financial management. Easy to track transaction and expenses very easily at any time without any hassle.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: A fast and secure application to activate all bank transfers.
description: My experience in this platform is free and does not require oversight. It is a really reliable and fast-paced product, and the most important thing is to secure all operations that take place in bank transfers and others.
author: Abdelati L.
pros: The program secures all bank changes and is effective and fast. It is truly an amazing product in the financial management.
cons: What is beautiful about the work of the product is fast and du credibility in the work. This is the most important thing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Edson M.
pros: Provides reliable hosting packages and unlimited SSD with site builders
cons: Can be costly if you need to use the premium package to smaller businesses
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: AppNomu: Uganda's affodable, secure and user friendly App that offers financial reedom
author: Michael W.
pros: Secure, faster and borderless with high-level security to protect user sensitive information. Modern technology has been used to secure AppNomu infrastructure from data breaches and bot attacks.
cons: Sometimes AppNomu tends to be slow and takes more time to load data. This disappoints especially when its urgent. Payment network at times becomes too slow to finish transactions. But there is always room for improvement.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: AppNomu is one of the best finance app that can help to manage finance.
description: Overall, I really like AppNomu and would recommend it to anyone who is looking for a good way to manage their finances. It's easy to use, has great features, and the customer service is top-notch. Thanks for everything, AppNomu!
author: Kushal R.
pros: There are many things to like about AppNomu, but one of the things I appreciate most is the financial management tools. It's so important to be able to keep track of our finances, and AppNomu makes it easy. I also really like the customer service. They are always quick to respond to any questions I have.
cons: AppNomu is a decent app but there are definitely some areas that could use improvement. Like, the ledger does not seem to be updated in real-time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have used appnomu for two years its services are good there i no scumming of peoples fund i wish every one joins appnomu its here for the poor ugandans

description: I do my global transactions from this digital financial Service and I'm glad to find such a service on internet which is no paper writings but everything is done online.

review_title: Simple and easy to use software
description: Overall i have enjoyed using this software to make airtime transactions, mobile money and also buy utilities.
author: david C.
pros: AppNomu's simple graphical user interface is very simple and basic. It's not complicated and doesn't need users to first learn how to use. Also the good and low prices discounts given on transactions and utility payments make it a very good software to use for paying my utility bills.
cons: There are certainly no feedbacks given on rejected loan applications. You just go to loan applications and find that your applications have disappeared. They should really find a way of giving feedback to users on why their applications have been rejected!!
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: prateek M.
pros: I am impressed with its diverse selection of applications, making it more efficient and useful, and also helps me in enhancing my digital experience.
cons: Sometimes I noticed, that some characterised features can be inaccurate and incomplete which makes it a little challenging.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
